title: RadGraph-XL: Radiology Entity and Relation Extraction
description: Entity and relation extraction from radiology reports. Annotators identify clinical entities (Anatomy, Observation, Medical Device, Procedure, Descriptor) and label relations between them (located_at, suggestive_of, modify, part_of).
citation:
@inproceedings{khanna-etal-2024-radgraph,
    title = "{RadGraph-XL}: A Large-Scale Expert-Annotated Dataset for Entity and Relation Extraction from Radiology Reports",
    author = "Khanna, Jean-Benoit  and Kahn Jr., Charles E.  and Langlotz, Curtis P.  and Rajpurkar, Pranav",
    booktitle = "Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2024",
    month = aug,
    year = "2024",
    address = "Bangkok, Thailand",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2024.findings-acl.765"
}
